sub_fields.label: Top Callout First Line
sub_fields.name: top_callout_first_line
sub_fields.instructions: Enclose text in "strong" HTML tags to highlight it.

sub_fields.label: Contact Phone
sub_fields.name: contact_phone
sub_fields.instructions: The default value for this field is the Main Phone Number set in the Contact options

sub_fields.label: Top Callout Second Line
sub_fields.name: top_callout_second_line
sub_fields.instructions: Enclose text in "strong" HTML tags to highlight it.

sub_fields.label: Google Maps Embed Code
sub_fields.name: google_maps_embed_code
sub_fields.instructions:
Paste the embed URL only (starts with https://www.google.com/maps/embed)
Not the full <iframe> code - just the src URL.

sub_fields.label: Form Section
sub_fields.name: form_section
sub_fields.instructions: Enclose text in "strong" HTML tags to highlight it.
